title: ジャパンCの後に・挑戦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond finishes the Japan Cup. Tokai
Teio compliments her on her performance, as well
as the blinding intensity of the gaze she turned on
her opponents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio says that she too always strives to
take on new challenges.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After hearing that, Satono Diamond decides that
she also wants to keep being a challenger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to take on any challenge and open a
new chapter of history for both the Umamusume
world and for the Satono family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is Satono Diamond's way of being an
illustrious runner.
